title: Piano
text: The piano is a keyboard instrument that produces sound when keys are pressed.

title: Guitar
text: The guitar is a string instrument usually played by strumming or plucking the strings.
fact: Most standard guitars have six strings.

title: Violin
text: The violin is a small string instrument played with a bow.
fact: The violin is one of the highest-pitched string instruments.

title: Drum
text: The drum is a percussion instrument played by striking its surface.
fact: Drums help keep rhythm in music.

title: Flute
text: The flute is a woodwind instrument that produces sound when air flows across the opening.
fact: The flute is one of the oldest musical instruments.
